Package com.rays.dao

Class StudentDAOImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl<StudentDTO>
      • com.rays.dao.StudentDAOImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    BaseDAOInt<StudentDTO>, StudentDAOInt
    @Repository
public class StudentDAOImpl
extends BaseDAOImpl<StudentDTO>
implements StudentDAOInt
    Data Access Object (DAO) implementation for StudentDTO in the ORS application.

    Extends BaseDAOImpl to inherit common JPA-based CRUD operations and implements StudentDAOInt. Provides entity-specific implementations for retrieving the DTO class type, building dynamic search filter predicates based on student attributes, and populating derived fields before persistence.

    Author:
    Krati Trivedi

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      (package private) CollegeDAOInt collegeDao
      DAO for retrieving CollegeDTO data used to populate the college name on the student record before persistence.

    • Method Detail

      • getDTOClass

        public java.lang.Class<StudentDTO> getDTOClass()
        Returns the Class type of StudentDTO managed by this DAO.
        Specified by:
        getDTOClass in class BaseDAOImpl<StudentDTO>
        Returns:
        StudentDTO.class

      • getWhereClause

        public java.util.List<javax.persistence.criteria.Predicate> getWhereClause​(StudentDTO dto,
                                                                           javax.persistence.criteria.CriteriaBuilder criteriaBuilder,
                                                                           javax.persistence.criteria.Root<StudentDTO> qRoot)
        Builds and returns a list of JPA Predicate conditions for filtering student records based on the non-empty or non-null fields of the given StudentDTO.

        The following fields are used for filtering when non-empty or non-null:

        • enrollmentNo â€” filters students whose enrollment number starts with the given value
        • firstName â€” filters students whose first name starts with the given value
        • collegeName â€” filters students whose college name starts with the given value
        • email â€” filters students whose email starts with the given value
        • dob â€” filters students by exact date of birth match
        • phoneNo â€” filters students whose phone number starts with the given value

        Specified by:
        getWhereClause in class BaseDAOImpl<StudentDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the StudentDTO containing filter values
        criteriaBuilder - the CriteriaBuilder used to construct predicates
        qRoot - the Root of the criteria query for StudentDTO
        Returns:
        a list of Predicate conditions for the WHERE clause

      • populate

        protected void populate​(StudentDTO dto,
                        UserContext userContext)
        Populates derived fields on the StudentDTO before it is persisted.

        If a valid collegeId is present on the DTO, the corresponding CollegeDTO is retrieved and the college name is set on the student record.

        Overrides:
        populate in class BaseDAOImpl<StudentDTO>
        Parameters:
        dto - the StudentDTO to be populated
        userContext - the current user's context
